name: Customer Stack Blueprint - Backstory Starter
description: Transforms a typed customer stack config plus selected adapter packs into an implementation blueprint that recommends the best validated workflow assets, orchestration recipe, and connector substitutions.

nodes.name: Blueprint Intake Webhook
nodes.notes: Receive a customer workflow request with fields such as workflow goal, orchestrator, CRM, messaging tool, meeting source, and implementation constraints.

nodes.name: Workflow Parameters

assignments.name: defaultOrchestrators
assignments.value: n8n, Make, Power Automate, Zapier, Workato

nodes.notes: Point the validated asset URL to the library or documentation source that contains your known-good workflow assets.

nodes.name: Normalize Intake Payload
nodes.notes: Normalize stack-intake forms from CRM records, forms, tickets, or solution-request webhooks into a shared structure.

nodes.name: Match Validated Patterns
nodes.notes: This node encodes the productization logic: pick the closest validated asset, then fall back to orchestrator recipes and connector substitutions.

nodes.name: Design Blueprint

options.systemMessage: You are a workflow solution architect turning one-off requests into repeatable implementation patterns using typed customer config and adapter-pack assets.

nodes.notes: Attach your preferred LLM credentials after import.

nodes.name: Deliver Blueprint

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { customerName: $json.customerName, workflowGoal: $json.workflowGoal, customerConfigRef: $json.customerConfigRef, selectedPackIds: $json.selectedPackIds || [], missingRoles: $json.missingRoles || [], blueprint: $json.output || $json.text || JSON.stringify($json) } }}

nodes.notes: Replace this with Slack, Teams, email, ticketing, or documentation sinks as needed.
